basic_details.short_information: Intelligent Communication Systems India (ICSIL) Advisor (Finance & Accounts) Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on the official website of ICSIL. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICSIL Advisor (Finance & Accounts) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 65 years. Age relaxation can be extended in exceptional cases by the Competent Authority & Board.

qualification.education_qualification: Qualified CA / CMA from Institute of Charted Accountants of India / Institute of Cost Accountants of India
qualification.details: Advisor (Finance & Accounts): Qualified CA / CMA from Institute of Charted Accountants of India / Institute of Cost Accountants of India. Retired officer from Government / PSU / Autonomous Body having a minimum post-qualification experience of 30 years in Finance & Accounts functions. Candidates having experience in senior-level positions in Finance, Accounts, Audit, Taxation, Budgeting, and Financial Management will be preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: IDA Pattern: 50% of last pay drawn. CDA Pattern: difference between last pay drawn and pension + DA.
salary_details.details: IDA Pattern / Officers from PSU: Remuneration shall be paid all inclusive, equal to 50% of the last pay drawn (last Basic + last DA thereon). They shall not be entitled for increase in DA or revision in pay. CDA Pattern/Officers from Govt.: Remuneration of Govt. Officers shall be governed by Govt. Rules, and the consolidated remuneration all inclusive, shall be restricted to the difference between last pay drawn by him/her (last basic pay + CDA) and his/her pension + DA at the rate fixed at the time of hiring.

selection_process: Screening of applications w.r.t. eligibility criteria Document Verification Interaction / Interview with the Selection Committee
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICSIL Advisor (Finance & Accounts) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICSIL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICSIL Advisor (Finance & Accounts) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the ICSIL Advisor (Finance & Accounts) recruitment is 10 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Advisor (Finance & Accounts) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Advisor (Finance & Accounts) post in ICSIL.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Advisor (Finance & Accounts) position?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Qualified CA / CMA from the Institute of Charted Accountants of India / Institute of Cost Accountants of India.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Advisor (Finance & Accounts) post?
faq.answer: The age limit is not exceeding 65 years with 6 months. Age relaxation can be extended in exceptional cases.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the ICSIL Advisor (Finance & Accounts) recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for all candidates is Rs. 590/- (Non-refundable).

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Advisor (Finance & Accounts) role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes screening of applications, document verification, and an interaction/interview with the Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job for the Advisor (Finance & Accounts) post?
faq.answer: The job is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the Advisor (Finance & Accounts) position?
faq.answer: The salary is based on IDA Pattern (50% of last pay drawn) or CDA Pattern (difference between last pay drawn and pension + DA).

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum experience required for the Advisor (Finance & Accounts) role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a minimum post-qualification experience of 30 years in Finance & Accounts functions.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply for the ICSIL Advisor (Finance & Accounts) recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification and application link can be found in the Important Links section of this article.
